name: MoneyGram
description_short: National City, CA MoneyGram at 1201 E Plaza Blvd offers check-cashing, money transfers, and bill payment services daily 8AM-10PM.
description_long:
The MoneyGram at 1201 E Plaza Blvd is a standalone check-cashing location in National City, CA, serving the South Bay community with extended operating hours. Open Monday through Sunday from 8AM to 10PM, this location is easily accessible for residents of National City and surrounding areas who need quick financial services.

At this National City MoneyGram, you can send and receive money transfers, cash checks, pay bills, and handle other money services. The staff is trained to process transactions quickly. For questions or to confirm specific services, call +1 800-746-7287. Services are available throughout the full daily operating hours.

If you need reliable check-cashing or money transfer services in National City, CA, bring a valid government-issued ID and any relevant payment information. The extended hours at this location make it convenient for residents with varied schedules. MoneyGram provides trusted money movement and bill payment solutions for National City families and businesses.
address: 1201 E Plaza Blvd, National City, CA 91950

company_info.headquarters: 1201 E Plaza Blvd, National City, CA 91950

pros: Extended daily hours (7 AM-11:59 PM, seven days a week) at this location for accessibility
Can send and receive money both domestically and internationally through the MoneyGram network
Ability to manage transfers online or in-person, offering flexibility in transaction methods
Located within an existing retail store (Video Club), providing convenient neighborhood access
Simple identity verification process with standard legal ID requirement
Multiple services available at single location: money transfer, check cashing, money orders, bill payment
No account opening required for basic cash transaction services
cons: Service availability entirely dependent on agent location partnerships—not all neighborhoods have access
No information provided about fees, exchange rates, or transfer costs on the website
Limited control over service quality since MoneyGram relies on third-party retail partners
Cash-only services with no indication of credit-building, savings, or investment products
Hours and service offerings may vary by location despite corporate standards
best_for: Customers needing to send or receive money transfers without opening a bank account
Individuals who require check cashing services at convenient neighborhood retail locations
People seeking money transfer services during extended evening and weekend hours
Customers making international remittances who want a familiar, established provider
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need reliable money transfer and check cashing services without traditional banking relationships. The primary caveat is that MoneyGram is a transaction-based service provider, not a financial institution—it offers no credit building, savings products, or long-term financial solutions, and pricing information is unavailable on the website.
meta_description: National City, CA MoneyGram check-cashing at 1201 E Plaza Blvd - fast money transfers and bill payments, open 8AM-10PM.
